title: Poem From Burma
content:
�Brush your teeth up and down, brother,
    Oh, brush them up and down!
    All the folks in London Town
    Brush their teeth right up and down.
    Oh! How they shine!
    Aren�t they bloody fine?
    Night and morning, my brother,
    Oh brush them up and down!�
meaning:
George Orwell (Eric Arthur Blair)'s contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Poem From Burma"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
